Package org.areslib.subsystems.drive

Class MecanumDriveIO.MecanumDriveInputs

java.lang.Object
org.areslib.subsystems.drive.MecanumDriveIO.MecanumDriveInputs
All Implemented Interfaces:
AresLoggableInputs
Enclosing interface:
MecanumDriveIO
public static class MecanumDriveIO.MecanumDriveInputs extends Object implements AresLoggableInputs
Loggable data object containing the state of all four mecanum wheel pods.
